label: Refresh
description: Run Google Calendar task sync, regenerate agent context, the dashboard, content schedules, and current agent periodic rollups.

label: Refresh Schedule Register
description: Register the macOS LaunchAgent that refreshes at load, at the configured morning time, and via short due checks after wake/login until today's refresh succeeds.

label: Refresh Schedule Unregister
description: Unload and remove the macOS LaunchAgent for the daily vault refresh.

label: Refresh Schedule Status
description: Show the configured LaunchAgent label, schedule, catch-up interval, retry settings, load state, and last successful refresh date.

label: Folder Register
description: Register an existing context folder and regenerate vault wiring.

label: Sync Apple Notes
description: Import the configured Brain Dump Apple Note into the vault inbox and copy attachments according to the vault Brain Dump ingest config.

label: Context
description: Regenerate compact agent-readable context, realized system notes, the dashboard, content schedules, and current periodic rollups.

label: Inventory
description: Print agent-friendly context folders, task statuses, epics, and projects for low-context task routing.

label: Content Schedules
description: Generate current 4-week content schedule notes from enabled cadence JSON and maintain each enabled context folder's current schedule link.

label: Attachments Dry Run
description: Preview attachment routing and cleanup without changing files, showing planned destination moves, unresolved links, and rewrite counts.

label: Attachments Apply
description: Apply planned attachment routing and cleanup so note attachments live under each owning root folder's _obsidian/attachments directory.

label: Epic Views Sync
description: Regenerate per-epic task Kanban Bases and the managed epic views in the master tasks kanban.

label: GCal List Week
description: List the next 7 days of Google Calendar events across all calendars as agent-friendly JSON.

label: GCal Ensure Calendars
description: Create or find the Time Blocks, Scheduled Tasks, and Due Tasks calendars used by vault scripts.

label: GCal Sync Tasks Dry Run
description: Preview the two-way TaskNotes due/scheduled mirror without changing tasks or Google Calendar.

label: Git Maintenance
description: Keep local Git history shallow at 5 commits and prune local unreachable objects.

label: Mobile Profile
description: Refresh .obsidian-mobile with the safe mobile plugin set plus theme, style, color, icon, and snippet settings.

label: Profile Upgrade Dry Run
description: Preview Obsidian profile updates only: plugins, theme, hotkeys, snippets, and safe profile settings.

label: Profile Upgrade Apply
description: Apply Obsidian profile updates only and install active plugin bundles without touching vault content.

label: Path Audit
description: Find persisted vault-root paths that would break after moving the vault.

label: Obsidian Profile Backup
description: Back up root .obsidian under _master/system/backup.

label: Backup Sync Setup
description: Run the interactive rclone Google Drive backup/sync setup wizard.

label: Backup Sync Status
description: Show rclone backup/sync remotes, sources, mounts, LaunchAgents, logs, and locks.

label: Backup Sync Shared Drives
description: Open the Shared Drive picker to add/remove rclone Shared Drive remotes and read-only mounts.

label: Bootstrap Export
description: Export the public bootstrap vault from the current vault into the configured export root.

label: Dependency Repos Status
description: Show external dependency repo checkout state and managed projection health.

label: Dependency Repos Dry Run
description: Preview cloning, fast-forward pulls, and managed projection rebuilds for external dependency repos.

label: Dependency Repos Sync
description: Clone or fast-forward pull external dependency repos, rebuild managed projections, and refresh skill links.

label: Upgrade Dry Run
description: Preview public bootstrap vault updates plus external dependency repo sync and write an upgrade report.

label: Upgrade
description: Apply public bootstrap vault updates, then sync external dependency repos and projections.

label: Upgrade Doctor
description: Check public bootstrap upgrade state, hidden upstream Git wiring, and repo metadata.
